business_model: Recurring memberships with additional revenue from private coaching and intro offers
business_goals: Convert more intro offers into ongoing memberships
Reduce manual admin work without adding headcount
known_problems: Lead follow-up is inconsistent after trial visits
sales_notes: Trial visitors get ad hoc follow-up and there is no consistent lead stage tracking after the first visit.
operations_notes: Scheduling and class repackaging decisions are still manual, especially for underused midday slots.
collections_notes: Failed recurring payments are retried manually and paused memberships are not reviewed on a fixed cadence.
notes: Owner wants practical recommendations that fit the current team.
